title: Naming Request
description: The public request contract used to ask for a resource to be named, tagged, or labeled according to project conventions. Callers supply only the information specific to the resource being requested; the Context Resolution pipeline enriches this request into a complete Resource Identity (see resource-identity.schema.json). This schema is intentionally small and is expected to grow in future versions.

profile.description: The name of the Convention Pack to use to enrich this request with organizational and governance defaults.

resource_type.description: The type of resource being requested.

functional.description: Functional Identity information specific to this request.

domain.description: The bounded context or business domain the resource belongs to.

service.description: The service within the domain that the resource supports.

component.description: The specific building block or module within the service.

deployment.description: Deployment Identity information specific to this request. Most deployment information is resolved by Context Providers rather than supplied here.

instance.description: Distinguishes multiple instances of an otherwise identical resource.

overrides.description: Explicit values that override attributes otherwise resolved by the Convention Pack or Context Providers.

custom_metadata.description: Additional caller-supplied metadata that does not map to a defined Resource Identity attribute.
